title: Image dataset of realistic breast lesions from physical breast phantoms and simulation studies
author: Bliznakova, Kristina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Dataset of images used in a study called "Assessment of a method for manufacturing realistic breast lesions for experimental investigations". 
 The dataset consists of two types of images. 
 
 Images from a mammography unit of 3D printed breast lesions placed in a specifically designed container, which mimics compressed breast. 
 Images from a mammography simulation study of breast lesions. 
 
 The DataProcessing.xlsx containes detailed data and values of the performed ANOVA statistical test.
